subtopic: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies
title: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies: A short position in a futures contract means the trader...
summary: Analyze the obligations created by entering a futures contract.
prompt: A short position in a futures contract means the trader is obligated to buy the underlying asset at expiry.
solution: This statement is false. A short position in a futures contract obligates the trader to sell the underlying asset at expiry, not buy it. In contrast, a long position obligates the trader to buy the asset. Understanding these roles is fundamental in trading futures and managing associated risks.
